abilities: The wheel of life and death turns.
chatter: I could do this on my own. Probably faster, too.
I really need to get quieter boots. * sigh *
Ugh. Another stain on my cloak. When did this happen? I didn't even notice.
Let's try not to screw this up.
I don't like losing. Shape up.
Screw up again and this is over.
Our last chance to strike fear into their hearts.
They cannot kill me in a way that matters.
This time I'll finish the job.
Better stay out of my way.
Now this is more like it.
call-outs: There's a lot of them. Be careful.
I can't see you, but I know you're there.
Stand your ground. It's almost over.
Time's short. Deliver the final blow.
eliminations: I like the way you die.
Happy Holidays. (while in Winter Wonderland event)
Merry Christmas. (while in Winter Wonderland event)
Peace on earth... (while in Winter Wonderland event)
Tin cans, a dime a dozen. (eliminating any omnic)
Another one off the list. (eliminating any Overwatch member)
You used to be better at this. (eliminating Ana )
I didn't teach you all my tricks. (eliminating Cassidy )
Should have paid closer attention. (eliminating Cassidy )
You always did have a high opinion of yourself. (eliminating Cassidy )
You never were a good student. (eliminating Cassidy )
That in your master plan? (eliminating Doomfist or Ramattra )
You always were a liability. (eliminating Emre )
Not so proud now, are you? (eliminating Hazard )
Out of my way, hairball! (eliminating Jetpack Cat )
Nothing to worry about anymore. (eliminating Juno )
Enjoy your afterlife. (eliminating Ramattra or Zenyatta )
There can be only one. (eliminating another Reaper )
You left retirement for that? (eliminating Reinhardt or Sojourn )
Back in your cage, Doctor. (eliminating Sigma )
This is how it should have been. (eliminating Soldier: 76 )
Guess failure runs in the family. (eliminating Vendetta )
Still trying to play hero, monkey? (eliminating Winston )
Go back to the waterpark. (eliminating Wuyang )
Death is swift. (eliminating enemy using movement-based ability)
Death has wings, too. (eliminating airborne enemy)
*chuckle* I was nowhere near you. (long-range elimination)
I know your tricks. (eliminating Cassidy using Deadeye)
I knew you'd get sick of him some day, Ana. (eliminating Ana while Reaper is Nano-Boosted)
The dragon retreats. (eliminating Hanzo before using Dragonstrike)
"Quack, quack", sitting duck. (eliminating Junkrat using RIP-Tire)
A fallen angel. (eliminating Mercy using Valkyrie)
Amateur. (eliminating another Reaper using Death Blossom)
You're just a shadow of me. (eliminating another Reaper using Death Blossom)
Pig's on the spit. (eliminating Roadhog using Whole Hog)
Give it a rest, Jack. (eliminating Soldier: 76 using Tactical Visor)
No, Jack. You're done. (eliminating Soldier: 76 using Tactical Visor)
You saw nothing. (eliminating Soldier: 76 using Tactical Visor)
Death was waiting for you, amiga. (eliminating Sombra using Translocator)
Nice, Oxton. Right into the shotguns. (eliminating Tracer using Blink or Recall)
Settle down, monkey. (eliminating Winston using Primal Rage)
No one's left to stop us.
Should have paid closer attention. (to Mauga )
I thought you were in charge. (eliminating Doomfist )
Nice to see you do your job for once.
interactions: Reaper : Tell Jack to stop chasing me. Ana : I have. He wouldn't listen. Reaper : Isn't that just like him?
Reaper : I didn't need your help. Ana : I know the old Gabriel is grateful.
Reaper : Your heart is pounding, traitor. Are you scared? Baptiste : Has anyone ever told you that you're kind of a creep?
Baptiste : You know what they say: seasons don't fear the... Reaper : Don't. Just don't.
Baptiste : Reaper! Don't sneak up on me like that. Reaper : Just a reminder that you'll never see me coming.
Reaper : You're coming with us, Augustin. Baptiste : Why won't you leave me alone? Widowmaker : You're lucky. I just wanted to kill you.

Brigitte : Trust me, everyone... with Bastion on our side, this is going to go great! Bastion : *sheepish beeps* Reaper : Looks like a pile of outdated junk to me. Brigitte : Well, I'm happy to have you.
Cassidy : A friend told me that you're gettin' rusty. Reaper : You don't have friends.
Moira : *sigh* What a nauseating bout of déjà vu. Cassidy : Yep. Working with you has always made me sick. Reaper : Are you planning to whine the whole time... again? Genji : *sigh*
D.Va : You don't look so good. Maybe you should sit this one out and leave the kills to me. Reaper : I'll be fine once you shut up.
Reaper : ...What? What's your problem? D.Va : There's something... off about your vibe. Reaper : I don't have a... "vibe". D.Va : Oh, that's what it is!
Reaper : War isn't a game, girl. D.Va : That's funny! *laughs* Soldier: 76 said the same thing! Reaper : *groans*
Doomfist : You know the plan. Reaper : Leave no one alive.
Reaper : Imitate me, and you'll regret it. Echo : "Imitate me, and you'll regret it." Reaper : That's... not bad, actually.
Echo : I do not understand why you enjoy inflicting pain. Reaper : I'm an enigma. Deal with it.
Reaper : A bounty hunter for hire... You fell a long way from Overwatch . Freja : At least I didn't drag everyone else down with me.

Freja : I shouldn't be surprised you joined Talon . You always were good at causing problems. Reaper : (chuckle) You sound just like Sarıoğlu . Always spouting that righteous garbage. Freja : He stood for something when none of you would. Reaper : Right. And then, he walked.
Genji : I have not forgotten your part in Blackwatch . Reaper : What, do you want an apology? Genji : I no longer expect regret from you.
Hazard : You're not so scary, you know. Reaper : *dark chuckle* Someone has a death wish. Hazard : *laughs* Aye, like you wouldn't believe.
Illari : How do you work with that doctor after everything she did to you? Don't you want revenge? Reaper : Her time will come.
Reaper : Little miss sunshine's back to brighten everyone's day. Illari : Call me that again and you're a dead man walking. Reaper : Someone already beat you to that threat.
Junkrat : I like what you've got going on... the ghost powers, the magically replenishing shotguns, the mysterious identity... *light chuckle* You're a real character! Reaper : Shut. Up.
Junkrat : Wouldn't a scythe be more on brand? Reaper : I prefer shotguns. Junkrat : Can't really harvest with them, but who am I to argue with Death himself?
Reaper : Roadhog, take them head on. Roadhog : Got it. Junkrat : Hey, I want a mission too! Reaper : Try not to blow yourself up. Junkrat : Aw, but it’s me specialty!
Reaper : You got a problem, Junker? Roadhog : *chuckle* Junkrat : I don't do problems, just solutions! Roadhog : *laugh* Yeah! *wet sounds*
Reaper : Oh, good. Another freak from space. Juno : That is very unkind, you... whippersnapper! Reaper : What did you just call me? Juno : I do not know other equally insulting terms...!
Reaper : You brought a fox to a gunfight? *grumbling* Kiriko : You must be fun at parties. Reaper : I don't go to parties. Kiriko : Yeah, that makes sense. You'd have to be invited first.
Kiriko: Ajaraka mokuren tekerettsuno pa! (アジャらか木蓮 テケレッツのパ！) Mizuki: Um... Gesundheit? Kiriko: I was trying to get rid of that grim Reaper for you, but... he's still here. Reaper: *annoyed grumble*
Reaper : *laugh* Death catches up with you. Kiriko : It helps when death wears his running shoes.
Lúcio: So, I'm tryna ask everybody this: What is your favorite animal? Reaper: Any animal will do... if you're hungry enough. Lúcio: Uh... yeah, I can see it.
Mauga : Bet I could put a smile on that face of yours. Reaper : You'd lose that bet. Mauga : Even if I whip up some bloodshed, just for you? Reaper : Mmm. Dammit.

Mei : How did you become so miserable? Reaper : What do you think? Overwatch . Mei : But... I love being in Overwatch. It feels good to make a difference. Reaper : All that "difference" comes back to bite you. You'll see.
Mercy : What happened to you? Reaper : You tell me, doc.
Mercy : I'm not giving up on you, Reyes. Reaper : I wish you would.
Mizuki: You gonna reap souls without a scythe? Reaper: Guns get the job done. If you'd ever fired one, you'd know. Mizuki: Okay, hand me yours. Let's see what I can do.
Reaper : Is there nothing you can do for this pain? Moira : Think of it as... fuel beneath the flames of your vengeance. Reaper : *grumbles*
Moira : Don't die on me, now. You're one of my finest experiments. Reaper : Flattery will get you the grave.

Reaper : You really think Antonio 's daughter won't take out everyone involved in the Venice Incident ? *scoff* Moron. Moira : Only one man pulled the trigger that night. I'd be more concerned for his well-being.
Reinhardt : That chill in the air... it seems death walks among us! Reaper : Maybe you're just haunted. Reinhardt : Oh, I hope so! I'd love to fight off a ghost.
Reinhardt : Great work! Mostly me, though. Reaper : Look who finally found a way to contribute.
Reaper : This time, stay focused, old man. Sigma : How can one focus when viewing the infinite universe? Reaper : You'd better find a way. Fast.
Sigma : What a strange and fascinating molecular makeup! It could be worth examining... Reaper : No, thank you.

Sojourn : *sigh* Why didn't you talk to me before you ran off with Talon? Reaper : It would have turned into an argument. Sojourn : I thought we were friends, Gabe. Reaper : That's exactly why I left you out of it.

Soldier: 76 : Clean up your aim. I don't want a repeat of Paraguay . Reaper : What are you talking about? My aim is fine. Soldier: 76 : I caught friendly fire in San Lorenzo , remember? Reaper : Oh, right. That San Lorenzo.
Reaper : Overwatch is back. I'm surprised you aren't to blame. Soldier: 76 : I have plenty of trouble without dredging up old mistakes. Reaper : Hmph. We finally agree on something.
Reaper : Where's Amari ? Finally got sick of being your sidekick? Soldier: 76 : *grumble* It doesn't matter. I can solve this myself. Reaper : Sure. Keep telling yourself that, Jack.
Reaper : You've been quiet, Jack. Given up? Soldier: 76 : I stopped wasting my time. There are bigger threats to this world than Talon . Reaper : Is that so? We'll change that.
Sombra : Wanna know what Martina's been up to? Reaper : Not interested. Sombra : Hmm, that's not what my tracker says.
Reaper : We need to be careful. If Vendetta finds us, we're dead. Sombra : Uh, who's 'we'? You're the one who kill her old man . Reaper : If I go down, I'm taking you with me.
Reaper : *heavy breathing* Torbjörn : Can't you breathe a little quieter? Reaper : *even heavier breathing*
Reaper : "The Wolf of Retribution." *scoffs* And people say I'm dramatic. Vendetta : Don't test my fangs, "Gabriel Reyes." You'll end up bloody.
Vendetta : I hope you've made your funeral arrangements. You never know which fight will be your last. Reaper : They won't take me down out there. Vendetta : I should hope not. That honor is mine.

Vendetta : You ran when you killed my father! You ran from Overwatch , and now... you run from Talon . It seems cowardice is all you know. Reaper : Call it what you want. It'll keep me alive long enough to kill you someday.

Vendetta : Have you remained with Talon , I might have stayed your execution. Reaper : *grunt* Vendetta : Then again... perhaps your judgement was already overdue. Reaper : If you've got a point, make it. Vendetta : Never. This is far more entertaining.

Reaper : I thought you'd know better than Talon to kill Doomfist , since you never shut up about 'retribution'. Vendetta : You failed leader was already bleeding allies, and what few remain can be swiftly put down.
Venture : Hey! ¡Quiúbole, Gabrielito! How's it hangin'? Reaper : What did you call me? Venture : "Gabrielito"! That's your nickname, right? Reaper : *growl* Sombra ...
Widowmaker : Are you ever tempted to contact your wife? Reaper : No. Widowmaker : Afraid she would try to kill you? Reaper : I'd be surprised if she didn't.
Widowmaker : I'm taking leave after this mission. Reaper : Marital problems? Widowmaker : Not lately .
Winston : You couldn't stop Overwatch from getting back together. Now look at us! Reaper : You want a medal or something?
Winston : Anyone want to hear my favorite joke about the periodic table? Reaper : No.
Reaper : If you screw this up, I'll kill you myself. Wrecking Ball : The mammal says, "Likewise." Reaper : We're gonna get along just fine.
Reaper: So, Overwatch is hiring interns now. How adorable. Wuyang: I know, right? I actually applied just before you ran away from Talon .
Zenyatta : You spend your second chance at life walking a lonely road. Reaper : No one cares, monk. Zenyatta : Someone always cares. You must simply seek them out.
map-specific: You think Lucheng Interstellar is clean? *chuckle* Nobody is clean.
I should have burned Gibraltar to the ground. Maybe I still can.
